title: Powers of authorized representatives of collector
doc_html:
§1503.  Powers of authorized representatives of collector

Any duly authorized representative of the collector, when acting under his authority and direction, shall have the same power as is conferred upon the collector by this Sub-title.
doc_text:
§1503.  Powers of authorized representatives of collector
Any duly authorized representative of the collector, when acting under his authority and direction, shall have the same power as is conferred upon the collector by this Sub-title.
